name: Nippon Piston Ring Co., Ltd.
summary: Nippon Piston Ring Co., Ltd. produces and sells automobile engine parts, marine engine parts, and other products in Japan and internationally. The company offers automobile products, including piston rings for gasoline, diesel, motorcycle, and rotary engines; cylinder liners; valve seat inserts; composite and alloy cast iron camshafts; valve rocker arms, valve lifters/valve guide/rocker bridges; and aluminum reinforced composite, fuel injector parts, and synchronizer rings. It also provides marine and industrial piston rings; sealing rings for torque converters, turbochargers, hydraulic equipment, refrigerators, and engine for miniature models; and compressor parts for air conditioners and refrigerators. In addition, the company offers metal injection molding parts; and medical equipment parts, such as dental implants. Nippon Piston Ring Co., Ltd. was founded in 1931 and is headquartered in Saitama, Japan.
